SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Dec-08-2005 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 11:00am
Judge Pro Tem David May, clerk-beth wilber, nothing on record:
Cause called for Small Claims appeal. Appellant Ying Liu appears in pro per as representative for appellant Asiabizco, and Scott B. Weiss appears as respondent in pro per. Both parties were previously sworn, and testify in the narrative. Judge May reviews evidence, but no evidence was retained by the court.
